summary: Taiki has decisively flipped bullish in his most recent video, declaring 'The Bottom Is In' and predicting that specific leverage mechanisms will propel Bitcoin to higher prices.
narrative: After spending late 2025 aggressively shorting ETH and advocating for capital preservation, Maeda now believes the market has bottomed and is presenting buying opportunities. He argues against the standard 4-Year Cycle theory and suggests that STRC represents a form of marginal buying that will drive the next leg up for BTC.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
